chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 91 & 92 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.11.2025. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D. P.G for State. = This is fourth hearing of this lis before this bench and none are present on behalf of either applicant or the respondents. No intimation is received. However, fixed date and time was obtained from this bench on the last date of hearing by consent. Learned D.P.G is present and has assisted the Court. He contends that the order passed by the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Dadu is consistent with law and facts of the case. The background of this case is that presumably on 06.01.2025 there was an alleged incident between the applicant and proposed accused that led to the members of both parties, which also apparently have a family dispute inter se, to receiving certain injuries as a consequence of each others’ actions. These injuries are documented by the MLCs which were available with the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Indeed record reflects that both the parties suffered injuries. Accordingly the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace based on the information available directed the police officials to record the statements. I have perused the impugned order dated 11.02.2025 and do not find any defect in the legal reasoning based on the facts and circumstances of the incident as described in the said order and other related documents. Accordingly, both the Criminal Miscellaneous Applications are dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
